The **Tesla Cybercab,** **set for** **production in April 2026**, marks a historic turning point for the automotive industry. This fully autonomous robotaxi, with no steering wheel or pedals, has officially gone into production at the **Gigafactory Texas** in Austin, signalling Tesla’s entry into the era of large-scale autonomous mobility. ## Tesla Cybercab production April 2026: the official timeline. According to several sources and confirmations from Elon Musk, **Tesla Cybercab production** began in February 2026 with the first unit rolling off the production line, followed by a gradual ramp-up expected to reach several hundred units per week from **April 2026**. The Cybercab is based on an entirely new platform, sharing no components with the current Model 3 or Model Y. With **production** of the **Tesla Cybercab** set to begin, GreenDrive is preparing to offer accessories dedicated to this revolutionary new vehicle.","score":0.84948516,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://insideevs.com/news/778232/tesla-cybercab-production-april-2026","title":"Tesla Cybercab Production Will Begin In April 2026, Elon Musk Says","content":"# Tesla Cybercab Production Will Begin In April 2026, Elon Musk Says. Tesla CEO Elon Musk told investors during the automaker’s 2025 Annual Meeting on Thursday that production of the Cybercab will begin at the automaker’s Gigafactory Texas in April 2026. The Cybercab is a two-door coupe that was revealed at last year's \"We, Robot\" event. It'll have the same computers and sensors that power Tesla's current \"Full Self Driving\" (FSD) software in passenger vehicles like the Model 3 and Model Y, but this time it will supposedly be fully autonomous. It won't have pedals or a steering wheel, Musk said. “If we have to have a steering wheel, it can have a steering wheel and pedals,” Tesla chair Robyn Denholm told *Bloomberg* last month. Musk added that Tesla could theoretically build up to 5 million vehicles a year thanks to faster production—though, as history has repeatedly shown, Musk's bold forecasts are best taken with a substantial serving of salt.","score":0.83932644,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.basenor.com/blogs/news/tesla-cybercab-production-starts-at-giga-texas","title":"Tesla Cybercab Production Starts at Giga Texas","content":"# Tesla Cybercab Production Starts at Giga Texas.
